**Identifier:** `0x03/0x22`  
**Status:** verified

## Structure

Multi-variant zoning/state packet. Verified 2026-05-10 against
33 cross-pcap samples from 17/17 retail captures. Body[0] is a
sub-action discriminator:

```
[0]      0x22                   sub-opcode (constant)
[1]      sub-action              0x0d / 0x03 / 0x06 / 0x0b
[2..]    sub-action-specific
```

## Variants

| sub | size | name                           | use                      |
|----:|-----:|--------------------------------|--------------------------|
| 0x0d| 19 B | Zoning1 (zone-change request) | initiate zone transition |
| 0x03| 19 B | Zoning2 (zone-change confirm) | confirm BSP-load done   |
| 0x06| 9 B  | RequestPlayerNamebyPlayerId    | name lookup by char ID   |
| 0x0b| 7 B  | (zone-state ack?)              | uncertain                |

### Variant 0x0d Zoning1 (19B)

```
[0]    0x22                   sub-op
[1]    0x0d                   sub-action
[2..3] 00 01 / 00 04          flags (zone-class?)
[4..7] char_id LE32           character UID
[8..11] event LE32            zone event code
[12..15] counter LE32         increment counter
[16..18] tail bytes
```

Sample: `22 0d 00 04 d2 86 01 00 00 04 00 65 00 00 00 01 00 00 00`

### Variant 0x03 Zoning2 (19B)

Confirms BSP load complete after Zoning1 → server zone-handoff
state-machine advances. Body bytes are mostly zero (just
`[0x22][0x03][0x00][0x01][char_id LE32]` + 11 zeros).

### Variant 0x06 (9B)

```
[0]    0x22
[1]    0x06
[2..4] 00 00 00
[5..8] char_id LE32
```

### Variant 0x0b (7B)

```
[0]    0x22
[1]    0x0b
[2..3] 00 [01/09]
[4..6] 00 00 00
```

## Observed contexts

Triggered during zone transitions (player walks into a zone
boundary, uses GenRep teleport, enters subway). Sub-actions
0x0d + 0x03 always pair (Zoning1 followed by Zoning2 once BSP
load completes).

## Open questions

- Sub-action 0x0b: only 2 samples observed, both 7 bytes —
  appears to be a zoning-related ack but exact semantic
  unknown.
- Body[2..3] flag bytes in Zoning1: `00 01` dominant, `00 04`
  in PLAZA — possibly zone-class enum (city/sewer/apartment).

## Server-side handler

Decoded via `GamePacketReaderUDP.decodesub13()`:
- `case 0x22: pd.read()` switches sub-action:
  - `0x03` → {@link
    server.gameserver.packets.client_udp.Zoning2}
  - `0x06` → {@link
    server.gameserver.packets.client_udp.RequestPlayerNamebyPlayerId}
  - `0x0d` → {@link
    server.gameserver.packets.client_udp.Zoning1}

Zoning1 triggers the server's zone-handoff state machine
(see `memory/project_zone_handoff_fixed.md`).
